mapper.sql: id, temp_no, internal_no, patent_status, requirement, disclosure_name, applicant, inventor, patent_type, invited_to_group, contact_person, manager, agent, sponsor, sponsor_user_id, disclosure_date, disclosure_days, remark, contact_info, contact_email, contact_phone, entry_user_id, entry_user_name, copy_from_id, no_generate_mode, finalized_at, pending_report_at, synced_to_patent, patent_application_id, create_time, update_time

where.if: AND ( temp_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR internal_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR disclosure_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR applicant LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR contact_person LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR sponsor LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patent_disclosure ( temp_no, internal_no, patent_status, requirement, disclosure_name, applicant, inventor, patent_type, invited_to_group, contact_person, manager, agent, sponsor, sponsor_user_id, disclosure_date, disclosure_days, remark, contact_info, contact_email, contact_phone, entry_user_id, entry_user_name, copy_from_id, no_generate_mode, finalized_at, pending_report_at, synced_to_patent, patent_application_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{tempNo}, #{internalNo}, #{patentStatus}, #{requirement}, #{disclosureName}, #{applicant}, #{inventor}, #{patentType}, #{invitedToGroup}, #{contactPerson}, #{manager}, #{agent}, #{sponsor}, #{sponsorUserId}, #{disclosureDate}, #{disclosureDays}, #{remark}, #{contactInfo}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPhone}, #{entryUserId}, #{entryUserName}, #{copyFromId}, #{noGenerateMode}, #{finalizedAt}, #{pendingReportAt}, IFNULL(#{syncedToPatent}, 0), #{patentApplicationId}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO patent_disclosure ( id, temp_no, internal_no, patent_status, requirement, disclosure_name, applicant, inventor, patent_type, invited_to_group, contact_person, manager, agent, sponsor, sponsor_user_id, disclosure_date, disclosure_days, remark, contact_info, contact_email, contact_phone, entry_user_id, entry_user_name, copy_from_id, no_generate_mode, finalized_at, pending_report_at, synced_to_patent, patent_application_id, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{tempNo}, #{internalNo}, #{patentStatus}, #{requirement}, #{disclosureName}, #{applicant}, #{inventor}, #{patentType}, #{invitedToGroup}, #{contactPerson}, #{manager}, #{agent}, #{sponsor}, #{sponsorUserId}, #{disclosureDate}, #{disclosureDays}, #{remark}, #{contactInfo}, #{contactEmail}, #{contactPhone}, #{entryUserId}, #{entryUserName}, #{copyFromId}, #{noGenerateMode}, #{finalizedAt}, #{pendingReportAt}, IFNULL(#{syncedToPatent}, 0), #{patentApplicationId}, NOW(), NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE temp_no = VALUES(temp_no), internal_no = VALUES(internal_no), patent_status = VALUES(patent_status), requirement = VALUES(requirement), disclosure_name = VALUES(disclosure_name), applicant = VALUES(applicant), inventor = VALUES(inventor), patent_type = VALUES(patent_type), invited_to_group = VALUES(invited_to_group), contact_person = VALUES(contact_person), manager = VALUES(manager), agent = VALUES(agent), sponsor = VALUES(sponsor), sponsor_user_id = VALUES(sponsor_user_id), disclosure_date = VALUES(disclosure_date), disclosure_days = VALUES(disclosure_days), remark = VALUES(remark), contact_info = VALUES(contact_info), contact_email = VALUES(contact_email), contact_phone = VALUES(contact_phone), entry_user_id = VALUES(entry_user_id), entry_user_name = VALUES(entry_user_name), copy_from_id = VALUES(copy_from_id), no_generate_mode = VALUES(no_generate_mode), finalized_at = VALUES(finalized_at), pending_report_at = VALUES(pending_report_at), synced_to_patent = VALUES(synced_to_patent), patent_application_id = VALUES(patent_application_id), update_time = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT FROM patent_disclosure ORDER BY id DESC
